_description: Model derivations for France vs Spain SF (2026-07-14, match_id de7b7b6f-f3a8-4948-af5e-f0f4565728d0, AT&T Stadium Arlington TX, neutral venue). First match priced with the design-#1 joint simulation from ML_MODEL_BUILD_RESEARCH_2026-07-13.md C.3: all goal-structure questions read off ONE 200k-draw market-calibrated simulation (bot/simulate_fra_esp_sf.py -> 11_simulation_results.json). Market anchors from Smarkets event 45192700 (09_smarkets_quotes_processed.json, fetched ~05:30Z 2026-07-14). Form data from live ESPN summaries, all 6 games each team (10_espn_form.json + supplement).

point_in_time_elo.source: ml/backtests/fra_esp_sf_point_in_time_elo_replay.py; stale frozen values (2129/2226) overstated Spain's edge by 60 Elo points

match_context.note_on_elo_vs_market: Corrected Elo says near-even (Spain +36); market makes France clear favorite (40/30). Market includes lineup/venue/form information Elo cannot see; RULE1/RULE2 give market priority. The stale Elo would have said Spain much stronger -- the point-in-time fix moved our prior TOWARD the market, de-risking the disagreement.

fitted_simulation_params.hydration_breaks_observed: first 23-25' (median 24), second 63-76' (median 67), measured across all 12 FRA/ESP games from ESPN delay events

match_context.jtc_crowd_status: not observable pre-close via any known endpoint (structural platform limitation)

key_form_facts.mbappe: scored 5/6 games (2,2,0,2,1,1 = 8 goals), 2 assists in the game he did not score; SOT 4,3,2,4,4,2
key_form_facts.yamal: 1 goal 0 assists in 6 games (S/A hit 1/6 = 0.167); still active (SOT 0,2,0,4,2,2; 6 shots vs BEL); drought CONTINUED after the POR-ESP suppression won +38.48 on this exact question
key_form_facts.single_digit_scorer_share: FRA 5/16 (all Dembele #7), ESP 3/10 (Merino #6 x2, Fabian #8) = ~0.31 combined; market-normalized first-scorer share 0.2853
key_form_facts.var_events: VAR decisions in 7/12 games but only 1 near-certain ON-FIELD review (FRA-PAR penalty award 67'); question requires the referee at the monitor, not a booth check
